title: Highly Efficient and Stable Dion−Jacobson Perovskite Solar Cells Enabled by Extended π‐Conjugation of Organic Spacer
type1_summary: No clear figure-ready tabular or replot-ready datasets were identified in the inspected files.
type2_summary: The deposit contains computational input/support files (basis/pseudopotential files) and supplementary videos, all of which are non-tabular and require substantial processing before plotting.
classification_notes: The paper itself does not provide a clear data availability statement pointing to figure data. The Zenodo files appear to be a mix of computational support files and supplementary videos, not cleaned experimental datasets. No Type 1 source-data tables were identified.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper does not explicitly mention this file, but the publication is an experimental perovskite solar cell study with no stated figure-data repository; the Zenodo deposit appears to contain supplementary computational/input materials rather than cleaned figure tables.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Archive contains binary files named BASIS_ALL and PSEUDO, which strongly suggests pseudopotential/basis-set input data for calculations. These are not tabular, figure-ready datasets and are not directly plottable.
file_classifications.reasoning: This is best interpreted as supporting computational input/raw materials rather than replot-ready data. The contents are not processed measurements or figure tables, so it fits Type 2.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: without internal file headers, exact provenance is not fully confirmed, but the binary basis/pseudo naming strongly indicates non-figure input data.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: This is a paper manuscript file, not a dataset file.
file_classifications.file_evidence: PDF of the pre-accepted paper version; contains narrative text, figures, and references rather than structured data.
file_classifications.reasoning: Documentation only; not data and not replot-ready.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper does not explicitly state that the supplementary archive is raw data, but the presence of large video files in the supplement indicates experimental observation data rather than cleaned figure tables.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Large archive (122.1 MB) containing Video S1.mp4 and Video S2.mp4. Video files are binary, unstructured, and require frame extraction/processing before any quantitative plotting.
file_classifications.reasoning: Supplementary videos are raw/primary observational outputs, not figure-ready tabular data. They require substantial processing to extract usable measurements, so Type 2.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Low to moderate: the archive may also contain other materials, but the inspected contents clearly include raw video data.

file_classifications.file_evidence: Binary file extracted from pseudo_basis_1.zip; name indicates basis-set content. Not tabular, not figure-specific, and not directly plottable.
file_classifications.reasoning: This is computational input/raw support material, not cleaned data for plotting. Type 2.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: exact format is unknown, but naming and binary structure are consistent with basis-set input.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: No explicit paper statement, but the file is part of a computational support archive rather than a figure-data deposit.

file_classifications.reasoning: Pseudopotential files are input data for simulations, which are raw/supporting computational files. Type 2.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: exact internal format not inspected, but the file naming is highly indicative.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports an experimentally optimized Dion-Jacobson 2D perovskite solar cell using an extended π-conjugated organic spacer to improve film quality, charge transport, efficiency, and long-term stability.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No explicit dataset or source data location could be confirmed from the available information.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found, and no downloadable data files or URLs were identified on the publisher page.
